name: vendor alias and edge-case normalization wave
summary: Adds vendor-style aliases, broader specimen normalization forms, and unit spelling variants for the existing biomarker catalog, verified through a dedicated edge-case fixture and slice-specific checker.
user_visible_flows: operator runs normalize on vendor-style alias inputs and receives correct canonical mappings
system_flows: vendor alias strings map to existing deterministic biomarker definitions
specimen shorthand values normalize before candidate filtering
unit spelling variants normalize before conversion
notes: The main verification artifact for this slice is the dedicated edge-case checker script created specifically for this fixture.
